scripts.build: cd onboarding-tutors && npm install && (cp ../../../config/.env .env || cp ../.env.local .env || echo 'no env') && npm run build && rm -rf ../.next && mkdir -p ../.next/standalone/.next && cp -r .next/standalone/* ../.next/standalone/ && cp -r .next/static ../.next/standalone/.next/static && cp -r public ../.next/standalone/public && (cp .env ../.next/standalone/.env || echo 'no env to copy')
